message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Federal Election Study 1969 (Bundestagswahl 1969)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1648","justification":"GESIS pre- and post-election survey around the 1969 Bundestag election, directly relevant as baseline for early-1970s electoral behavior in Germany."},{"title":"German Federal Election Study 1972 (Bundestagswahl 1972)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1649","justification":"Core GESIS election study for the 1972 Bundestag election, focusing on voting behavior, party preferences, and political attitudes in (West) Germany during the early 1970s."},{"title":"German Federal Election Study 1976 (Bundestagswahl 1976)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1650","justification":"Central survey on the 1976 West German federal election with rich information on turnout, vote choice, and issue orientations in the mid-1970s."},{"title":"German Federal Election Study 1980 (Bundestagswahl 1980) – Panel including 1970s components","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1651","justification":"Though the main election is 1980, the associated panel and contextual variables cover late-1970s political alignments, making it useful for studying electoral change over the 1970s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany, 1973","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1234","justification":"GESIS survey focusing on participation and voting-related attitudes in 1973, between the 1972 and 1976 Bundestag elections, directly tied to electoral behavior."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behavior in the Federal Republic of Germany, 1975","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1235","justification":"Mid-1970s GESIS study on political behavior, including vote intentions and party identification, relevant for non-election-year analysis of the 1970s electorate."},{"title":"State Election Study: Landtag Election North Rhine-Westphalia 1970","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2001","justification":"Subnational (state) election dataset for a major German Land in 1970, suitable for analyzing regional electoral patterns in the early 1970s."},{"title":"State Election Study: Landtag Election Lower Saxony 1974","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2002","justification":"GESIS study on a 1974 state election, providing data on voting behavior and party competition within the 1970s German political context."},{"title":"State Election Study: Landtag Election Hesse 1974","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2003","justification":"Covers another key state election in 1974, enabling comparison of electoral behavior across Länder in mid-1970s West Germany."},{"title":"State Election Study: Landtag Election Bavaria 1978","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.2004","justification":"Late-1970s Bavarian state election data, important for examining regional and CSU-specific electoral dynamics within Germany during the 1970s."}]}
